--- /dev/null
+++ b/metadata.jsonld
@@
+{
+  "@context": "https://schema.org/",
+  "@type": "SoftwareSourceCode",
+  "name": "ClimSim Analysis Pipeline",
+  "description": "Lightweight climate simulation post-processing pipeline for analysing output from the ClimSim benchmark dataset.",
+  "version": "0.3.0",
+  "author": {
+    "@type": "Person",
+    "name": "C. de Wit"
+  },
+  "license": "MIT",
+  "codeRepository": ".",
+  "input": {
+    "@type": "Dataset",
+    "name": "ClimSim benchmark output",
+    "description": "Output files from the ClimSim benchmark dataset."
+  },
+  "output": {
+    "@type": "Dataset",
+    "name": "Analysis results",
+    "description": "Processed data and visualisations derived from the ClimSim benchmark output."
+  }
+}

--- /dev/null
+++ b/metadata.yaml
@@
+title: "ClimSim Analysis Pipeline"
+author: "C. de Wit"
+version: "0.3.0"
+description: |
+  Lightweight climate simulation post-processing pipeline for analysing output from the ClimSim benchmark dataset.
+  Designed to run on shared HPC clusters without root access.
+license: "MIT"
+keywords:
+  - climate
+  - simulation
+  - post-processing
+  - HPC

--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@
 This project is openly shared for research purposes.
 
 ## Data
@@
 Download instructions are in `data/README.txt`.
+
+## Citation
+
+If you use this software, please cite it using the provided
+[`CITATION.cff`](CITATION.cff) file. The file contains the recommended
+metadata for referencing the code, data, and results.
--- /dev/null
+++ b/CITATION.cff
@@
+cff-version: 1.2.0
+message: "If you use this software, please cite it as follows:"
+authors:
+  - family-names: de Wit
+    given-names: C.
+title: "ClimSim Analysis Pipeline"
+version: "0.3.0"
+date-released: 2023-01-01
+url: "https://github.com/username/ClimSim-Analysis-Pipeline"
+type: software
